title: All production code uses RedisStreams constants for stream names
evidence: Searched services/*/src and shared/*/src for hardcoded 'stream:*' string literals. coordinator/src/coordinator.ts:328,574 and coordinator/src/opportunities/opportunity-router.ts:128,130 contain 'stream:forwarding-dlq' and 'stream:dead-letter-queue' but only in code comments (not in executable code). All executable stream references use RedisStreams.* or RedisStreamsClient.STREAMS.* constants.
expected: No hardcoded stream name strings in production code
actual: 0 hardcoded stream names in production code (only in comments)
recommendation: No action needed. Stream name discipline is strong.

title: Consumer group names consistent with expected set
evidence: Found groups in production code: coordinator-group (coordinator.ts:396), execution-engine-group (opportunity.consumer.ts:175, fast-lane.consumer.ts:103), cross-chain-detector-group (detector.ts:333,346,353), mempool-detector-group (mempool-config.ts:78), orderflow-pipeline (orderflow-pipeline-consumer.ts:81), self-healing-manager (expert-self-healing-manager.ts:38), failover-${serviceName} (cross-region-health.ts:750). All match expected set. stream-health-monitor.ts:124 uses 'coordinator-group' as default -- matches real group name.
expected: coordinator-group, cross-chain-detector-group, execution-engine-group, mempool-detector-group, orderflow-pipeline, self-healing-manager, failover-{serviceName}
actual: All 7 expected groups found, no unexpected groups

title: STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS covers all 24 canonical streams
evidence: RedisStreamsClient.STREAM_MAX_LENGTHS (streams.ts:404-432) has 24 entries, exactly matching the 24 streams defined in RedisStreams (events.ts:19-61). SA-1C-004 default MAXLEN (5000) applies as fallback for any unregistered streams.

title: No raw xadd calls bypassing MAXLEN in changed files
evidence: Checked all 28 changed files for this.xadd( / redis.xadd( / client.xadd( calls outside RedisStreamsClient. None found. Changed files (parsers, path-finder, rate-limiter, worker-manager, validation.ts, client.ts, streams.ts) do not contain direct xadd calls. The only this.client.xadd calls are inside RedisStreamsClient.xadd() method (streams.ts:700,709,718) which is the approved wrapper.
expected: No raw xadd calls outside RedisStreamsClient
actual: 0 raw xadd calls in changed files

title: No new XREADGROUP consumers without XACK in changed files
evidence: Checked all 28 changed files for xReadGroup/XREADGROUP. Only shared/core/src/redis/streams.ts contains XREADGROUP (line 897,963) and it also has xack (lines 927,972-1023). stream-consumer.ts has xack at lines 296,385,441. No changed file introduces consume-without-ack.
expected: All files with XREADGROUP also have XACK
actual: Confirmed: streams.ts and stream-consumer.ts both have matching consume+ack patterns

title: 8 env vars used in code but undocumented in .env.example
evidence: Undocumented env vars found in production code: CACHE_L1_SIZE_MB (shared/core), DEBUG_TESTS (likely test-only but in shared source), FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2 (feature flag), FEE_MULTIPLIER, GIT_SHA, OCI_RESOURCE_PRINCIPAL_VERSION, SUCCESS_RATE, TTL_MS. HIGH-tier (thresholds/features): CACHE_L1_SIZE_MB, FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2, FEE_MULTIPLIER, SUCCESS_RATE, TTL_MS. MEDIUM-tier: DEBUG_TESTS, GIT_SHA, OCI_RESOURCE_PRINCIPAL_VERSION.
expected: All production env vars documented in .env.example
recommendation: Add these to .env.example with appropriate defaults and descriptions. FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2 is a feature flag that should follow the FEATURE_* pattern in .env.example. CACHE_L1_SIZE_MB affects performance-critical path.

title: ~230 env vars in .env.example not referenced in production code via process.env
evidence: Large set of documented env vars not found via process.env.* grep in services/*/src or shared/*/src: includes chain-specific private keys (ETHEREUM_PRIVATE_KEY, BSC_PRIVATE_KEY, etc.), scanner API keys (ETHERSCAN_API_KEY, BSCSCAN_API_KEY, etc.), risk management vars (RISK_*), flash loan contract addresses (FLASH_LOAN_CONTRACT_*), commit reveal contracts (COMMIT_REVEAL_CONTRACT_*), KMS key IDs (KMS_KEY_ID_*), bloxroute vars (BLOXROUTE_*), various feature flags, and deployment/testing vars. Many are read indirectly via config objects or used in scripts/contracts.
expected: Documented vars should be used in code or clearly marked as script-only/deployment-only
actual: ~230 documented vars not directly referenced via process.env.* in production source
recommendation: LOW urgency. Many are expected for multi-chain system (per-chain keys, contract addresses). Consider adding section comments in .env.example indicating which vars are for deployment scripts only vs runtime.

title: FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2 undocumented feature flag
evidence: process.env.FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2 used in production code but not listed in .env.example among the other FEATURE_* flags. All other feature flags (FEATURE_COMMIT_REVEAL, FEATURE_FLASH_LOAN_AGGREGATOR, etc.) are documented.
expected: All FEATURE_* flags documented together in .env.example
recommendation: Add FEATURE_FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2 to the Feature Flags section in .env.example with description and default value.

title: CACHE_L1_SIZE_MB undocumented but affects hot-path performance
evidence: process.env.CACHE_L1_SIZE_MB is used in shared/core to configure L1 cache size (SharedArrayBuffer). This is performance-critical per CLAUDE.md hot-path rules but not documented in .env.example.
recommendation: Add CACHE_L1_SIZE_MB to .env.example under a Performance Tuning section with the default value and impact notes.

title: Checks 1A-1E complete
evidence: 1A: 0 findings (all stream names use constants). 1B: 0 findings (7/7 consumer groups match). 1C: 0 findings (24/24 MAXLEN, no raw xadd in changed files). 1D: 0 findings (no consume-without-ack). 1E: 4 findings (8 undocumented code env vars [HIGH], ~230 documented-but-unreferenced [MEDIUM], 2 specific callouts [MEDIUM]). Total: 0 CRITICAL, 1 HIGH, 3 MEDIUM, 6 INFO.
